spec.description: Comprehensive Kubernetes cluster monitoring — nodes, workloads, resources, network & storage. Filter by namespace, node, or pod.

spec.title: Nodes
spec.description: Total number of nodes in the cluster

spec.title: Restarts (1h)
spec.description: Container restarts in the last hour

spec.expr: topk(10, sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{container!="", container!="POD", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[5m])) by (pod, namespace))

spec.title: Top 10 Memory — Pods
spec.description: Top 10 pods by memory working set

spec.expr: topk(10, sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{container!="", container!="POD", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}) by (pod, namespace))

spec.title: CPU Requests vs Usage by Namespace
spec.description: CPU requests vs actual usage by namespace — helps identify over/under-provisioning

spec.title: Memory Requests vs Usage by Namespace
spec.description: Memory requests vs actual usage by namespace — helps identify over/under-provisioning

spec.title: Node Network I/O
spec.description: Network bandwidth per node (RX positive, TX negative)

spec.title: Node Disk I/O
spec.description: Disk throughput per node (read positive, write negative)

spec.title: Container Restarts Over Time
spec.description: Container restart events over time — non-zero restarts only

spec.title: OOM Killed Containers
spec.description: Containers that were OOM killed — indicates memory limits are too low

spec.title: Containers Waiting
spec.description: Containers in waiting state (CrashLoopBackOff, ImagePullBackOff, etc.)

spec.title: Deployment Replica Availability
spec.description: Ratio of available replicas to desired. < 1.0 means under-replicated.

spec.title: Kubernetes Cluster
